translations.en: a man with a serpent-and-heart tabard covering his chainmail.
translations.zh: 一位身穿鏈甲、外罩蛇心徽紋罩衫之男子。

translations.en: "Good $T. We meet again."
translations.zh: 「$T 吉祥。吾等再度相遇。」

translations.en: "I welcome thee to Jhelom."
translations.zh: 「吾歡迎汝至傑隆城。」

translations.en: "I am Zellivan, and I am lord here."
translations.zh: 「吾乃澤利凡，此地之主。」

translations.en: "Pray tell me thy name."
translations.zh: 「請告知吾汝的名號。」

translations.en: "Ah, the Avatar! Lord @British has spoken fondly of thee, $G.
translations.zh: 「啊，聖者！@不列顛王曾對汝讚譽有加，$G。

translations.en: Please feel at home in this town."
translations.zh: 請在此城賓至如歸。」

translations.en: "Thou mayst call me Zellivan."
translations.zh: 「汝可稱吾澤利凡。」

translations.en: "The @valorous are often boisterous. I watch over the fighters."
translations.zh: 「@勇武之人往往豪放不羈。吾負責照料這些武士。」

translations.en: "I held a tournament, to decide who would be entrusted with the rune's care."
translations.zh: 「吾舉辦了一場比武，以決定誰有資格保管符文。」

translations.en: "You might say that '@no @man' was the victor..." He smiles.
translations.zh: 「汝或許可以說，勝者乃『@無名@之人』……」他微笑道。
translations.note: joke on 'no man' — Nomaan the NPC's name

translations.en: "Hear it for thyself at the Sword and Keg @Pub, $G."
translations.zh: 「汝可親往劍與桶@酒館親耳聆聽，$G。」

translations.en: "The songs and @tales do the heart good, I say!"
translations.zh: 「歌聲與@故事令人心曠神怡，吾如是說！」

translations.en: "Ask him yourself!"
translations.zh: 「汝親自去問他！」

translations.en: "Those who live the warriors' life like to sing,
translations.zh: 「過著武士生涯之人喜歡歌唱，

translations.en: and to regale one another with fanciful accounts of their exploits."
translations.zh: 也樂於向彼此誇耀自己的英雄事蹟。」

translations.en: "Here in Jhelom we delight in the clash of @arms and the din of @battle."
translations.zh: 「在傑隆城，吾等熱衷於@兵刃相交的搏鬥與@戰鬥的喧囂。」

translations.en: "Speak to Nomaan if thou hast need of arms."
translations.zh: 「若汝需要武器，可去找諾曼。」

translations.en: "If thou hast tales of swordsmanship, then the Sword and Keg is the place for thee."
translations.zh: 「若汝有劍術故事，劍與桶酒館便是汝的去處。」

translations.en: "'Tis on the north side of town."
translations.zh: 「此乃在城鎮北側。」

translations.en: "Ah, battle!" he sighs.
translations.zh: 「啊，戰鬥！」他嘆道。

translations.en: For a time he reminisces with you, trading stories about past exploits.
translations.zh: 他與汝共話往昔，互述過去的英勇事蹟，暢敘片刻。

translations.en: "Only an earthquake could make Jhelom tremble, I daresay."
translations.zh: 「唯有地震方能令傑隆城顫抖，吾敢如此斷言。」

translations.en: "We had one just last year."
translations.zh: 「去歲便發生了一次。」

translations.en: "The piers were broken up, but the @shipwrights repaired them swiftly."
translations.zh: 「碼頭受損，但@船匠迅速修繕完畢。」

translations.en: "The shipwrights of Jhelom are fastidious and frugal craftsmen."
translations.zh: 「傑隆的船匠乃一絲不苟、節儉勤勉的工匠。」

translations.en: "I grew up near Castle Britannia."
translations.zh: 「吾是在不列顛城堡附近長大的。」

translations.en: "'Twas the sunset o'er Brittany Bay
translations.zh: 「正是不列塔尼灣上的落日餘暉
translations.note: partial string, Brittany Bay is a bay name

translations.en: and the ships at rest in the harbor which drew me away to the sea."
translations.zh: 以及停泊港中的船隻，引吾走向大海。」

translations.en: "Farewell, my friend."
translations.zh: 「告辭，吾友。」

translations.en: "I cannot help thee with that."
translations.zh: 「此事吾無法助汝。」

translator_notes: 澤利凡是傑隆城爵主，武人氣質，語氣豪邁正直。'no man' 是雙關（Nomaan 是 NPC 名字），以「無名之人」暗示，保留笑點。Nomaan 音譯為「諾曼」。
